bird.name: Sulawesi bush warbler
bird.summary: The Sulawesi bush warbler (Locustella castanea) is a species of Old World warbler in the family Locustellidae. It is endemic to the island…

relations.subject: Sulawesi bush warbler
relations.evidence: The Sulawesi bush warbler is found in undisturbed primary montane forest and in secondary forest, as well as adjoining thick scrub, bushes and rank grassland
relations.object_summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

relations.object_summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。
